query:
INSERT IGNORE INTO research_field_tag_mapping (tag, research_field)
SELECT 
  TRIM(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(tags_expanded.tag_value, '$'))) as tag,
  research_field
FROM (
  SELECT 
    p.research_field,
    p.tags,
    JSON_LENGTH(p.tags) as tag_count
  FROM professors p
  WHERE p.tags IS NOT NULL 
    AND p.tags != 'null' 
    AND p.tags != '[]'
    AND p.research_field IS NOT NULL
) prof_data
JOIN JSON_TABLE(
  prof_data.tags,
  '$[*]' COLUMNS (tag_value VARCHAR(200) PATH '$')
) tags_expanded
WHERE TRIM(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(tags_expanded.tag_value, '$'))) != ''
GROUP BY TRIM(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(tags_expanded.tag_value, '$'))), research_field
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
LIMIT 5000;
